name: Amish Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in their jackets until soft.
2. Cool, peel, and dice the potatoes.
3. Mix the potatoes gently with the remaining ingredients: 3/4 cup sugar, 1 teaspoon cornstarch, salt to taste, 1/4 to 1/2 cup vinegar, 1/2 cup cream or evaporated milk, 1 teaspoon mustard, 3 tablespoons softened butter, and 1 cup mayonnaise.
4. Mix eggs with sugar, cornstarch, and salt until thickened.
5. Add vinegar, cream, and mustard; cook until thickened.
6. Remove from heat and beat in butter.
7. Add mayonnaise and mix until smooth.
8. Add the potato mixture to the cooled dressing, folding gently together.
